collection: CUL, T-S ; CUL, T-S ; CUL, T-S
description: Legal document in the hand of Ḥalfon b. Menashshe ha-Levi. Dated: first decade of Tammuz 1425 Seleucid = June 1114 CE, with the signing postponed until the middle decade of Av 1425 Seleucid = July 1114 CE. Rayyisa bt. Yeḥezqel renounces her right to her marriage payments and receives a divorce from Abū ʿUmar David b. Yefet. Signed by Avraham b. Shemaʿya he-Ḥaver descendant of Shemaʿya Gaʾon and Yiṣḥaq b. Shemuʾel the Spaniard. Reused on verso for an unidentified text; probably discussion in connection with Leviticus. (Information in part from CUDL)
description_he: מסמך משפטי בAramaic, Hebrew, Judaeo-Arabic מהמאה ה-12. מוחזק בספריית קיימברידג'.
